subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, in the path of the Ancient Beauty, sacrifice thy life and offer thyself as an oblation upon the dust of the threshold of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در سبیل جمال قدم فدای جان و خود را قربان خاک آستان رحمن نما پس
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
